open_questions: 2026-06-15 Agent SDK credit 配额细节（速率 / 配额 / 适用 plan）

issues_encountered: subagent 返回了 nested JSON 结构（card.one_liner/key_takeaways/open_questions_for_deep_dive）而非 card_body_markdown 字符串——主 Claude 收尾时整理为标准 markdown body 并精简至 5 条核心 takeaway

Starting June 15, 2026, Agent SDK and claude -p usage on subscription plans will draw from a new monthly Agent SDK credit
